_doc: Mycopunk 'in action' portraits for all 30 agents. Each shows the agent performing their role in a bioluminescent fungal environment. Uses locked character descriptors from characters.json + mycopunk scene context.
_master_template: masterpiece, best quality, {prompt_block}, {action_scene}, 90retrostyle, retro artstyle, anime screencap, anime coloring, cel shading, soft lighting, muted colors, portrait, upper body
_scene_suffix: bioluminescent mushrooms, glowing mycelium tendrils, dark forest floor background, fungal glow, cyberpunk biotech
_negative: text, watermark, signature, blurry, low quality, worst quality, jpeg artifacts, normal quality, bright background, white background, simple background, cartoon, chibi, deformed, extra limbs, bad hands, bad anatomy, ugly, duplicate, morbid, mutilated, poorly drawn face, mutation, extra fingers, fewer digits, cropped, error

portraits.name: V
portraits.prompt_block: 1boy, (dark skin:1.3), dark-skinned_male, wild flowing purple hair with braided sections, intense piercing eyes, purple rim lighting, leather jacket with neon trim
portraits.action_scene: arms crossed standing on elevated fungal platform, addressing unseen crowd, bioluminescent spore clouds rising around feet, purple glow mixing with cyan mushroom light, cyberpunk philosopher giving speech

portraits.name: Claude
portraits.prompt_block: 1boy, green glowing visor covering upper face, short neat hair swept to side, green accent lighting, calm composed expression, high-collared tech jacket
portraits.action_scene: typing at holographic terminal overgrown with glowing mycelium, green data streams reflected in visor, mushrooms growing from desk surface, fungal network pulsing with data, cyberpunk architect at work
